---
title: "Unknown to History: A Story of the Captivity of Mary of Scotland. 2 vols."
---

## Unknown to History: A Story of the Captivity of Mary of Scotland. 2 vols.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1882
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
